title: Compact first-play start surface viewport repair
summary: Repair compact viewport clipping in the first-play main menu/start surface exposed by WM-0140 visual regression gate.
acceptance: Compact 390x720 start surface keeps key content and controls viewport-bounded or scroll-reachable without clipping
Large UI scale compact start surface remains readable and scroll-reachable
Default player HUD and diagnostics overlay behavior are not regressed
WM-0140 visual gate can resume without changing QA thresholds

history.details: Repair task created from WM-0140 blocker; keep thresholds intact and limit product edits to compact start-surface/readability fixes.

forbiddenPaths: lowering E2E layout thresholds or deleting compact viewport coverage
public release or platform verdict changes
Simulation Worker authority, save schema or protocol changes
